title: Hadoop MapReduce Committer Manifest Stages Directory
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest/stages' directory in Hadoop MapReduce houses Java classes responsible for various stages of a MapReduce job's output committer process. The 'AbortTaskStage.java' class aborts a task by deleting its attempt directory, while 'CleanupJobStage.java' cleans up a job's temporary directory, deleting task attempt directories in parallel. 'SaveSuccessFileStage.java' saves the '_SUCCESS' file, and 'SetupJobStage.java' sets up the job attempt directory and task manifest directory. 'SetupTaskStage.java' creates a task attempt directory. These classes collaborate to ensure the successful completion and cleanup of MapReduce jobs, employing patterns such as inheritance and method overriding, and relying on Hadoop's file system and logging utilities.
